title: Install and configure Web3Modal v3 (WalletConnect v2)
description: Add Web3Modal v3 to the project and configure it with the WalletConnect Project ID. This provides the wallet connection UI (QR code modal, injected wallet support).
acceptance_criteria: Web3Modal v3 is loaded (CDN import or bundled)
WalletConnect Project ID is set from an environment variable or config constant
A createWeb3Modal() call is present in a shared wallet-client.js module
Supported wallets include MetaMask and WalletConnect QR
The modal opens when open() is called (verified visually)

steps.details: Go to cloud.walletconnect.com → Create a new project → copy the Project ID.
Import wallet-client.js in the browser console: import { modal } from './wallet-client.js'; modal.open(); — confirm the Web3Modal UI appears.

technical_notes: Web3Modal v3 + wagmi is the recommended pattern for WalletConnect v2. For a pure vanilla JS (no bundler) project, the ESM CDN import works but may have cold-load latency — acceptable for MVP.
